testcase.name: transactionHistoryPagination

testcase.name: freezeSettleCycle
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:33.536+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Frozen 5000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-1 2026-02-15T03:23:33.567+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Settled 3000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-1

testcase.name: freezeRefundCycle
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:33.647+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Frozen 4000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-2 2026-02-15T03:23:33.669+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Refunded 4000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-2

testcase.name: settleFrozenFloorAtZero
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:33.740+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Frozen 2000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-6 2026-02-15T03:23:33.759+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Settled 1000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-6

testcase.name: settleIdempotent
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:33.834+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Frozen 5000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-5 2026-02-15T03:23:33.854+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Settled 3000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-5 2026-02-15T03:23:33.870+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Settle already applied: exec-5:settle

testcase.name: chargeCreatesAccountAndTransaction
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:33.981+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Charged 10000 tokens for user 1

testcase.name: freezeIdempotent
